title: Timeline Person Icons Missing
excerpt: Logged into my timeline view this morning and the user icons are not shown next for the people that tasks are assigned to.  The icons were visible earlier this week.  Has anyone else experienced this?

posts.author: jasonshanks (Jason Shanks)
posts.cookedHtml: Logged into my timeline view this morning and the user icons are not shown next for the people that tasks are assigned to. The icons were visible earlier this week. Has anyone else experienced this?
